name: obsidian-knowledge-kit
description: Bootstrap, ingest, and refine an Obsidian knowledge base from Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Initialize, ingest, and refine an Obsidian knowledge base
interface.longDescription: Use Obsidian Knowledge Kit to bootstrap a codex-native vault, ingest external materials into stable notes, and refine a healthy Obsidian knowledge base with shared preflight and dependency checks.
defaultPrompt: Initialize my active Obsidian vault for codex-native knowledge workflows
Ingest a local folder or URL into my Obsidian knowledge base
Refine my knowledge vault structure and fix stale status notes
